initiative.name: HomoPlasticus WP Rebuild — Stage 3: Ecosystem + Release (Milestone C)
initiative.objective: Deliver WooCommerce Pack, Worker Integration Pack, Extension SDK, 5 Compat Packs, and Community Release. Plugin submitted to WordPress marketplace. Cloud Control Plane designed (ADR) and implemented.
initiative.prerequisite: Stage 02 WO-WP-S2-DONE acceptance check must PASS

teammates.name: builder-woocommerce-worker
teammates.objective: Build WooCommerce Pack (WO-009) and Worker Integration Pack (WO-015). Both are optional addon packs that degrade gracefully when their dependencies (WooCommerce, worker service URL) are absent.

teammates.name: builder-sdk-compat
teammates.objective: Build the Extension SDK (WO-017) and all 5 Compatibility Packs (WO-018a-e: Yoast, ACF, Gravity Forms, WPML, UpdraftPlus). Each compat pack is an independent plugin using the Extension SDK.

teammates.name: systems-architect-cloud
teammates.objective: Produce the Cloud Control Plane ADR (required before WO-016 implementation). Design multi-site enrollment, policy push, audit ingestion, and billing hooks. Produces ADR artifact; implementation handed off to builder-cloud after approval.

teammates.name: builder-cloud
teammates.objective: Implement Cloud Control Plane (WO-016) after ADR is approved. Builds: WordPress plugin cloud client, site enrollment abilities, control plane Nx app (enrollment registry, policy API, audit ingestion).
teammates.notes: BLOCKED until systems-architect-cloud produces ADR and principal approves.

teammates.name: docs-release
teammates.objective: Produce all Community Release Pack artifacts (WO-019): updated readme.txt, CHANGELOG.md, marketplace assets (screenshots, banner, icon), operator guide, extension author guide, privacy policy, support matrix, migration guide. Run WordPress Plugin Check before submission.
teammates.notes: Runs last. Requires @verifier marketplace readiness check PASS before final submission.

approvalGates.description: systems-architect-cloud must produce ADR and principal must approve before builder-cloud starts WO-016
@verifier runs WordPress Plugin Check and marketplace compliance audit before WO-019 release submission

doneCriteria: WooCommerce Pack abilities degrade cleanly when WooCommerce is inactive
Worker Integration Pack returns { available: false, reason: 'worker-not-configured' } when worker URL absent
Extension SDK example pack installs and registers one working ability
All 5 compat packs (Yoast, ACF, Gravity Forms, WPML, UpdraftPlus) install independently and degrade if target plugin is inactive
Cloud Control Plane ADR produced and accepted
Plugin zip passes WordPress Plugin Check (plugincheck.wp.net) with zero blocking issues
Operator guide, extension author guide, privacy policy, support matrix all published
Plugin submitted to wordpress.org/plugins/ review queue
